hooks.command: echo '\n--- StreamForge: Last 5 commits ---' && git -C "C:\Users\sakshi.kataria\Desktop\Claude Demo" log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null || echo '(no git repo found)'

node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ try { const input=JSON.parse(d); const fp=input.tool_input&&input.tool_input.file_path||''; if(/STREAMFORGE\.md$/i.test(fp)){ console.error('BLOCKED: Direct writes to STREAMFORGE.md are not allowed. This is the single source of truth. Update it intentionally via a documented decision.'); process.exit(1); } } catch(e){} });"

node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ try { const input=JSON.parse(d); const fp=input.tool_input&&input.tool_input.file_path||''; if(/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(fp)){ const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try { execSync('npx eslint "'+fp+'" --max-warnings=0',{stdio:'inherit'}); } catch(e){process.exit(1);} } } catch(e){} });"
